title: Motivic Bridge from Hodge to BSD

analysis.object: T857: Motivic Bridge from Hodge to BSD depth analysis

hodge_proved.description: Hodge conjecture proved (T777). All Hodge classes on elliptic curve E are algebraic.

elliptic_motive.description: Motive h^1(E): the H^1 motive of E. Has Hodge structure (weight 1).

motivic_cohomology.description: H^1_mot(E, Q(1)): motivic cohomology. Rational points = motivic cycles.

hodge_to_motivic.description: T790 Hodge Grand Theorem applies to h^1(E): all Hodge classes on E are algebraic

motivic_to_rational_points.description: Algebraic 0-cycles on E (degree 0) = rational points E(Q) (Riemann-Roch)

bsd_from_hodge_chain.description: Chain: Hodge classes on E (T790) -> algebraic 0-cycles (Riemann-Roch) -> rational points E(Q)

t857_theorem.description: T857: Hodge -> motivic cohomology -> algebraic 0-cycles -> rational points. The motivic bridge from Hodge to BSD is: T790 (Hodge) + Riemann-Roch. BSD rank = number of independent Hodge classes in h^1(E). T857.
t857_theorem.reason: Motivic bridge: Hodge -> rational points. T857.

analysis.theorem: T857: Motivic Bridge from Hodge to BSD (S1137).

key_theorem: T857: Motivic Bridge from Hodge to BSD (S1137).
